ほら、司令官……！ こっちよ、こっち！<br>ノロノロ歩いてないで、早く来なさい: Come on, Commander...! Over here, this way! Don't dawdle, hurry up!
なんで自分が――って、さっき説明したでしょ？<br>今回の買い物には、あなたが必:
Why do I have to— I already explained, didn't I? That I need you for
this shopping. Ah, see? We're here.
そ、そう……これ……カ、カカ、カップルだとセットで貰える、<br>ゆるキャラグッ:
W-well... this... it's a... a c-c-couple set... you get these mascot
character goods... the limited couple bear set... yeah...
か、勘違いしないでよね！ ただ知り合いの男性があなたしかいなかったって<br>だ:
D-don't misunderstand! You're the only man I know—that's all! It's not
like I want to be a couple!
ええ……わ、分かればいいのよ、分かれば……まあ、あなたのお陰で<br>２つ買える:
Well... as long as you understand... Anyway, thanks to you I can buy
two... so, thank you... I'll do anything to repay you...
